title: mangifera pajang
intro: Mangifera pajang, also known as the Borneo mango or Pahang mango, is a species of plant in the genus Mangifera, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Borneo and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The fruit, leaves, and bark of the Mangifera pajang plant are used to treat various health issues, offering benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and protecting against cardiovascular diseases. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoctions, or infusions, which are believed to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
